---
applyTo: "common/**/*.R,data_sources/**/*.R,lectures/print_to_pdf.R"
---

# Shared R Instructions

- Reuse existing helper functions before writing new plotting or data-prep logic.
- Keep dependencies consistent with the repository’s current R workflow.
- Avoid replacing working code for style alone.
- When changing computations, keep downstream teaching text and figures consistent with the new output.
